🎉 Create a Board
🕊️ Condolence

Offer comfort
with kindness.

A compassionate group tribute board your whole team signs — heartfelt messages, shared memories, and words of comfort — delivered as a keepsake that honours a life well lived.

Create a Tribute BoardSee how it works

Flat fee · $5 per board · Unlimited contributors · Yours forever

💙 In Loving Memory
"Michael touched so many lives with his kindness and warmth. He was a beacon of positivity and professionalism, and we are grateful for every moment we got to know him."
STA+28
31 colleagues signed
🕊️
In Memory of Michael EvansA beloved colleague · 1968 – 2026
One tribute · One price$5

How it works

Four gentle steps to create a heartfelt tribute for those who grieve

Create Board

Start a compassionate tribute board and set up the memorial

1Dashboard

Share Comfort

Gather heartfelt messages, shared memories and words of comfort from the team

2Collaborate

Print Tribute

A beautifully bound memorial book printed and delivered to the family

3Keepsake

Send with Care

Share a private link with the family or send directly to their inbox with love

4Deliver

Hover over each card to explore

Global Condolence Map

Compassionate colleagues from around the world share their words of comfort and cherished memories to support those who grieve.

“
A

Aarav Sharma

Team Lead📍 New Delhi, India
2 hours ago

“ Our heartfelt condolences are with you and your family during this difficult time. May the cherished memories of your loved one bring comfort and strength in the days ahead. ”

Celebrate Every Milestone

Choose from 15+ occasion templates to start a board. Hover over a card to begin.
